title: The Essentials Sale
excerpt: In celebration of our roller date stamp appearing in "The Essentials" section as one of the "10 Most Wanted" items in the Fall issue of Scrapbook & Cards Today , we thought we would run a fun little sale in…
body:
In celebration of our roller date stamp appearing in "The Essentials" section as one of the "10 Most Wanted" items in the Fall issue of Scrapbook & Cards Today, we thought we would run a fun little sale in our shop. For the first time, we are offering Grab Bags, which have a retail value of over $60, for only $30! International orders are welcome, but MUST add the International $5 Shipping item to the cart.

The sale in the shop will only run through Sunday, December 9th or until they sell out (whichever comes soonest). Each grab bag will contain one of these date stamps, a zipper pouch from Blue Q, and all kinds of other goodies. May just be the perfect gift for the paper lover on your list! We really appreciate your support!
